Resources

A collection of various helpful resources

Webmaster resources

Sparrow's Guide to Accessible Webmastery - Guides and resources to make your website more accessible!

HTML Cheat Sheet - an HTML cheatsheet

sadgrlonline - webmaster resources from sadgrl

Online reference libraries for artists

  • Line of Action - reference photos and practice tools for visual artists including figure drawing, animal drawing, scenes & environment drawing, and more.
    • Support the creator
  • Afro Index- A Reference Library for Black Hairstyles
    • Support the creator
  • Posemaniacs- free 3d anatomy + pose reference library
  • x6ud.github.io/#/- Find animal reference photos based on skull angle
    • Support the creator here
  • x6ud.github.io/pose-search- Find pose reference photos based on poseable skeleton
    • Support the creator here
  • FilmGrab- large film reference library of movie stills
    • Support the creator here

Online resources and tools for artists

  • Coolors.co- color palette generator
  • Lospec- tutorials, palette lists, gallery, tools and resources for mainly pixel art and other low-spec forms of art
    • Support the creator here

Useful software for artists

  • pureref- program available for Windows, Mac and Linux that helps view and organize reference images on your desktop. Free if you set the contribution price to $0 at checkout
    • Support the creators here

dv9l / 2026
